caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white garment and a purple and red patterned cap, appears in a medium close-up shot against a dark, blurred background. He maintains a steady, neutral expression throughout the clip, looking directly at the camera with minimal movement. The screen features several overlays, including the "plustv" logo in the top left corner. A white banner across the middle of the screen displays the text "PLUS POLITICS" in a small purple box, followed by the headline "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU" in bold black capital letters. In the upper frames, a blue and white bar below the headline reads "WATCH ON" alongside the "DStv CH 408" and "Startimes CH 308" logos. In the lower frames, this bar changes to read "WATCH ONLINE" followed by the URL "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV".
